documents.title: WidgetClient fetch_record API
documents.content:
# WidgetClient fetch_record API

WidgetClient.fetch_record(record_id, timeout=5) fetches one record. The timeout argument is measured in seconds.

```python
record = WidgetClient().fetch_record(record_id="r-7", timeout=5)
```

documents.title: Configure widget cache mode
documents.content:
# Configure widget cache mode

Set cache_mode in widget.toml. Supported values are bounded and disabled.

```toml
cache_mode = "bounded"
```

documents.title: widget-sync command reference
documents.content:
# widget-sync command reference

Run widget-sync --dry-run to validate a synchronization without changing stored records.

documents.title: E_WIDGET_42 retry budget
documents.content:
# E_WIDGET_42 retry budget

E_WIDGET_42 means the retry budget was exhausted. Inspect backoff configuration and retry at most three times.

documents.title: Queue backpressure
documents.content:
# Queue backpressure

Backpressure keeps a fast producer from overwhelming a slow consumer. Use a bounded queue and pause the producer at the high-water mark.

documents.title: WidgetClient version 2 migration
documents.content:
# WidgetClient version 2 migration

In version 2, fetch_record is async. Migrate by awaiting WidgetClient.fetch_record and remove the legacy blocking adapter.

documents.title: DocAtlas canonical offline source policy
documents.content:
# DocAtlas canonical offline source policy

This repository rule makes repository-owned documentation authoritative for project decisions. Offline retrieval must not silently substitute generic external guidance.

documents.title: Gateway worker idempotency contract
documents.content:
# Gateway worker idempotency contract

The gateway creates an idempotency key and the worker persists it before acknowledgement. Both modules must preserve the same request identifier.

documents.title: Ограничение нагрузки очереди
documents.content:
# Ограничение нагрузки очереди

Ограниченная очередь защищает медленного потребителя: производитель приостанавливается при достижении верхнего порога нагрузки.

documents.title: WidgetClient version 1 fetch_record
documents.content:
# WidgetClient version 1 fetch_record

In version 1, WidgetClient fetch_record is blocking and uses the legacy adapter.
